allow: PowerShell($tmp = Join-Path $env:TEMP "coral-scaffold"; $dest = "C:\\Users\\DELL\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\Coral Coast Website"; Get-ChildItem -Path $tmp -Force | ForEach-Object { Move-Item -Path $_.FullName -Destination $dest -Force }; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $tmp -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem -Path $dest -Force | Select-Object Name)
